Protect Endangered Animals

Every life deserves respect. No species should disappear in the river of history.

C.F.T.W

They smiled when I was bleeding,
Once nothing is left, I'm back on beach again.
But only bricks and water existing,
I sit idly, waiting for heaven entering.

I dream beneath the frost's deep seal.
A boot crack crashed my trance.
A hand grabs my body for my forest oil
Now I only stay here, no move and no dance
Click to read more...
Those big guys put me in bath,
I thought that I could have a good nap
After hours, I never woke up
Those remained flesh may be seen at sup.
Click to read more...
They chased me for my teeth worldwide
I lived every day, terrified
Now I have nowhere to go
My only wish is to pass when old
Click to read more...
Expendable blood saves our lives for sure
The warmth of the forest oil is definitely the cure
Old Chinese trend, sponsored to have a feast
Fancy teeth shining too deep, curing with wealthy money at least
Click to read more...
Crying animals across the globe,
From every corner, such a massive scope!
The great nature brings up beauty
Wild creatures whimpered with misery

What Can We Do?

🚫 Reject Wildlife Products

Do not purchase ivory, rhino horn, tiger bones, or other endangered animal products. Cut off market demand.

🌿 Protect Natural Habitats

Support ecological projects and protect forests, wetlands, and other wildlife homes.

📢 Spread Awareness

Share stories of endangered animals to help more people understand their plight.

💰 Support Conservation Groups

Donate to or volunteer with wildlife protection organizations making a real difference.

🐾 🐾 🐾

Together, we can make a difference.
